title: Redynine's stuff
description: all sorts of things from Redynine!
body:
Tired of the monotony of minecraft items? Redynine's stuff will fix this situation! The mod will add a variety of items that will simplify and diversify your gameplay, such as the Thunderer sword, tunnel pickaxe, scuba gear and much more.

Now you can find aquamarine under the seas, and pear trees will grow in the savannah and plains. If it seems to you that vanilla tools break down quickly, then create a durable alloy and tools from it. With the help of topaz, which is generated under the savannahs, you will be able to speed up your tools and create mining items.
Also, the mod will give a new life to amethyst, adding the ability to create useful items

If you speak Russian, then you can join my discord server, where you can find news on my projects, chat with me and my team, or just find friends. However, if you do not speak Russian, this does not mean that you are not allowed on my discord server. You can also join, I will be glad to see everyone. In addition, all important news is duplicated into English, so you do not need to translate the text.
